memoryArtifacts.headline: Robert Moulton, 1475, by Myrtle S. Hyde
Sharon's Notes
memoryArtifacts.description:
NEHGS REGISTER 1987 p 327
Robert Moulton first appears on a subsidy roll for Scratby, Norfolk, dated 1573, paying a tax of L3.5.0 for "goods" (PRO, E179-328/117). He may have been son of John of Ormes …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Sharon's Notes
memoryArtifacts.description:
NEHGS REGISTER 1987 p 316
Was living in 1549. Margaret Moulton, widow, was listed on a 1545 subsidy roll, a 1546 assessment roll, and a 1549 manorial survey [PRO, E179-151/339, 348; SC12-24/5)


From …

zh.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特
zh.lifeSummary: Robert Moulton是thomas moulton的兒子，於大約1475年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。他於1498年與Margaret Watts在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於從1535年6月4日到1535年7月5日在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Moulton是thomas moulton的儿子，于大约1475年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。他于1498年与Margaret Watts在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于从1535年6月4日到1535年7月5日在英国諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Moulton was born about 1475, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the son of thomas moulton. He married Margaret Watts in 1498, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died from 4 June 1535 to 5 July 1535, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, and was buried in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Moultonは約1475年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットでthomas moultonの息子として生まれた。1498年にイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットでMargaret Wattsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はから1535年6月4日まで1535年7月5日にイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットで死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー サイント マーガレットにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby Saint: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Moulton(은)는 대략 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 thomas moulton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1498년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 Margaret Watts(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1535년 6월 4일부터 1535년 7월 5일까지 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby Saint: ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Robert Moulton родился около 1475 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали thomas moulton. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Watts в 1498 г. в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер с 4 июня 1535 по 5 июля 1535 в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия и был похоронен в местности ормесби сеинт маргарет, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
